PRIN.agent_summary: 17 enterprise architecture principles, telco/AI-native open-core. 3 NON-NEGOTIABLE.

REQ.agent_summary: 49 requirements. AI IN SCOPE. 2 conflicts resolved.

STKE.agent_summary: 16 stakeholders. MCMC/JPDP/NACSA triad. 12 drivers, 5 SMART goals.

MY_MYDIGITAL.agent_summary: MyDIGITAL alignment as commercial-enabler. arckit:my-* are slash commands; command-fallback used.

ADR-002.topic: Operator identity — Keycloak / CAMARA / auth-jwt integration and assurance level
ADR-002.agent_summary: Keycloak central IdP + constrained agent role + vaulted CAMARA egress; two-tier JWT assurance. File seq ADR-001.

MY_CLASSIFICATION.agent_summary: 4-tier commercial classification (PUBLIC/INTERNAL/CONFIDENTIAL/RESTRICTED), 10 datasets. Arahan Keselamatan explicitly NOT binding (comparator only); PDPA 2010 binds personal data. Command-fallback.

STRATEGY.agent_summary: 4 pillars: Standards Leadership (TMF921 CTK), Trusted Autonomous AI, Open-Core Integrity + reference engagement, Data Protection/Security/Regulatory. Mapped to outcomes O-1..O-4.

MY_PDPA.agent_summary: PDPA 2010 + Amendment 2024 fully apply (s.3 govt exemption inapplicable — commercial). 7 Data Protection Principles, DPO appointment, 72h breach notification, data portability, risk-based cross-border (Guideline 03/2025), RM1m penalties. Cross-border: Anthropic Claude INT-002, LangSmith INT-004. Command-fallback.

MY_CLOUD_FIRST.agent_summary: Residency keyed to commercial 4-tier ladder (NOT MyGovCloud/Cloud First — non-binding comparator). RESTRICTED subscriber PII Malaysia-resident under PDPA; secrets vault-only. Landing zones: AWS/Azure/GCP MY regions + operator private cloud; cloud-agnostic K8s+Istio. LangSmith egress flagged. Command-fallback.
